subcodes.first_line: O My spiritual one, My luminous one, My heavenly one! Though bodily afflictions rain down unceasingly like the showers of heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای روحانی من نورانی من ربانی من هر چند محن جسمانی مانند باران آسمانی متتابعست
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
